name: v1.3.0-beta — Rushes Log
body:
## Rushes Log (Beta)

Professional shooting day report for DIT workflows.

### New Features
- **Camera card auto-identification** — ARRI, RED, Blackmagic, Sony, Canon, DJI folder pattern matching
- **ffprobe media metadata** — resolution, frame rate, codec, color space, timecode (non-blocking background extraction)
- **4 export formats** — CSV, TSV, Excel (.xlsx), PDF with DIT sign-off area
- **Frontend view** — date picker, summary cards, sortable data table with 20 columns

### Quality
- 203 tests passed (145 lib + 23 abnormal + 13 AC + 22 command)
- All gates green: `fmt` / `clippy --all-targets` / `lint` / `build`
- Pinned `rust-toolchain.toml` at 1.93.1 for reproducible builds

### New Dependencies
- `rust_xlsxwriter 0.79` — Excel export
- `genpdf 0.2` — PDF export
